name: Sir Kenelm Digby
bio: The protagonist. Alchemist, courtier, and adventurer.

name: Venetia Stanley
bio: Digby's wife, whose honor he seeks to protect across the Mediterranean.

name: Thomas Allen
bio: Oxford mathematician and mentor. His secret library is the foundation of your knowledge.

name: John of Scanderoon
bio: A veteran of the Battle of Scanderoon. Carries a wound that responds to the Powder of Sympathy.

name: Sir Everard Digby
bio: The executed father. His legacy of treason is the 'Stigma' that haunts your voyage.

name: George Hartmann
bio: Digby's laboratory assistant. Skilled in the practical arts of chymistry.

name: Samuel Duclos
bio: A rival alchemist in the Paris Circle. Highly skeptical of the Vitriol of Copper.

name: Prince Charles
bio: The future Charles I. A patron whose favor is essential for your return.
